---
title: "finalscript2"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#Clip raw rasters to europe.
library(terra)

raw_dir  <- "E:/ERA5_Fire/raw"
clip_dir <- "E:/ERA5_Fire/raw_clipped"
dir.create(clip_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

bbox <- ext(-15, 25, 30, 65)

years  <- 1989:1990
months <- 1:12

for (yr in years) {
  for (m in months) {

    pattern <- sprintf("_%d_%02d\\.nc$", yr, m)
    files_to_clip <- list.files(file.path(raw_dir, yr), pattern = pattern, full.names = TRUE)

    if (length(files_to_clip) == 0) next

    for (f in files_to_clip) {

      out_f <- file.path(clip_dir, basename(f))
      if (file.exists(out_f)) next

      message("Clipping: ", basename(f))

      r <- rast(f)
      r_clipped <- crop(rotate(r), bbox)

      writeCDF(r_clipped, out_f, overwrite = TRUE, compression = NA)

      rm(r, r_clipped)
      gc()
    }
  }
}

message("Script 1 Complete: All files clipped.")
```


```{r}
#Process clipped rasters into the correct units and derive relative humidity using manus fomrula.
library(terra)

clip_dir <- "E:/ERA5_Fire/raw_clipped"
proc_dir <- "E:/ERA5_Fire/processed2"
dir.create(proc_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

years  <- 1989:1990
months <- 1:12

for (yr in years) {
  for (m in months) {

    check_f <- file.path(proc_dir, sprintf("Wind_%d_%02d.nc", yr, m))
    if (file.exists(check_f)) {
      message(sprintf("Skipping %d-%02d: Already processed.", yr, m))
      next
    }

    message(sprintf("Processing %d-%02d...", yr, m))

    t_file <- file.path(clip_dir, sprintf("2m_temperature_%d_%02d.nc", yr, m))
    d_file <- file.path(clip_dir, sprintf("2m_dewpoint_temperature_%d_%02d.nc", yr, m))
    u_file <- file.path(clip_dir, sprintf("10m_u_component_of_wind_%d_%02d.nc", yr, m))
    v_file <- file.path(clip_dir, sprintf("10m_v_component_of_wind_%d_%02d.nc", yr, m))
    p_file <- file.path(clip_dir, sprintf("hourly_total_precip_%d_%02d.nc", yr, m))

    if (!all(file.exists(t_file, d_file, u_file, v_file, p_file))) next

    t_r <- rast(t_file) - 273.15
    d_r <- rast(d_file) - 273.15
    u_r <- rast(u_file)
    v_r <- rast(v_file)
    p_r <- rast(p_file) * 1000

    rh_r <- 100 * (exp((17.625 * d_r)/(243.04 + d_r)) / exp((17.625 * t_r)/(243.04 + t_r)))
    ws_r <- sqrt(u_r^2 + v_r^2) * 3.6

    n_days <- nlyr(t_r)
    p_daily_list <- vector("list", n_days)

    for (d in seq_len(n_days)) {

      idx_noon <- ((d - 1) * 24) + 13

      if (d == 1) {

        prev_date <- as.Date(paste(yr, m, 1, sep = "-")) - 1
        p_prev_f <- file.path(
          clip_dir,
          sprintf("hourly_total_precip_%s_%s.nc",
                  format(prev_date, "%Y"),
                  format(prev_date, "%m"))
        )

        if (yr == 1989 && m == 1) {
          p_daily_list[[d]] <- sum(p_r[[1:13]])
        } else if (file.exists(p_prev_f)) {
          p_prev_r <- rast(p_prev_f) * 1000
          p_tail <- p_prev_r[[(nlyr(p_prev_r) - 10):nlyr(p_prev_r)]]
          p_daily_list[[d]] <- sum(c(p_tail, p_r[[1:13]]))
        } else {
          p_daily_list[[d]] <- sum(p_r[[1:13]])
        }

      } else {
        p_daily_list[[d]] <- sum(p_r[[(idx_noon - 23):idx_noon]])
      }
    }

    p_month_r <- rast(p_daily_list)

    writeCDF(t_r,       file.path(proc_dir, sprintf("Tmean_%d_%02d.nc", yr, m)), overwrite = TRUE)
    writeCDF(rh_r,      file.path(proc_dir, sprintf("RH_%d_%02d.nc", yr, m)), overwrite = TRUE)
    writeCDF(ws_r,      file.path(proc_dir, sprintf("Wind_%d_%02d.nc", yr, m)), overwrite = TRUE)
    writeCDF(p_month_r, file.path(proc_dir, sprintf("Tot_Precip_%d_%02d.nc", yr, m)), overwrite = TRUE)

    rm(t_r, d_r, u_r, v_r, p_r, rh_r, ws_r, p_month_r)
    gc()
  }
}

message("Script 2 Complete")
```


```{r}
#Apply land-mask and calculate fwi using fwiraster().

library(terra)
library(cffdrs)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)

proc_dir <- "E:/ERA5_Fire/processed2"
fwi_dir  <- "E:/ERA5_Fire/fwi2"
dir.create(fwi_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

years  <- 1989:2025
months <- 1:12

land <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")
land_vect <- vect(st_transform(land, 4326))

ffmc_prev <- NULL
dmc_prev  <- NULL
dc_prev   <- NULL

for (yr in years) {
  for (m in months) {

    t_f <- file.path(proc_dir, sprintf("Tmean_%d_%02d.nc", yr, m))
    if (!file.exists(t_f)) next

    t_stack  <- rast(t_f)
    rh_stack <- rast(file.path(proc_dir, sprintf("RH_%d_%02d.nc", yr, m)))
    ws_stack <- rast(file.path(proc_dir, sprintf("Wind_%d_%02d.nc", yr, m)))
    p_stack  <- rast(file.path(proc_dir, sprintf("Tot_Precip_%d_%02d.nc", yr, m)))

    land_mask <- rasterize(land_vect, t_stack[[1]], field = 1)

    n_days <- nlyr(t_stack)

    for (d in seq_len(n_days)) {

      out_f <- file.path(fwi_dir, sprintf("FWI_%d_%02d_%02d.nc", yr, m, d))
      if (file.exists(out_f)) next

      message("Processing: ", basename(out_f))

      t_r  <- mask(t_stack[[d]],  land_mask)
      rh_r <- mask(rh_stack[[d]], land_mask)
      ws_r <- mask(ws_stack[[d]], land_mask)
      p_r  <- mask(p_stack[[d]],  land_mask)

      fw_day <- c(t_r, rh_r, ws_r, p_r)
      names(fw_day) <- c("temp", "rh", "ws", "prec")

      if (is.null(ffmc_prev)) {
        ffmc_prev <- t_r; values(ffmc_prev) <- 85
        dmc_prev  <- t_r; values(dmc_prev)  <- 6
        dc_prev   <- t_r; values(dc_prev)   <- 15
      }

      init_stack <- c(ffmc_prev, dmc_prev, dc_prev)
      names(init_stack) <- c("ffmc", "dmc", "dc")

      fwi_day_res <- fwiRaster(
        input = fw_day,
        init  = init_stack,
        mon   = m,
        out   = "all"
      )

      writeCDF(fwi_day_res, out_f, overwrite = TRUE)

      ffmc_prev <- fwi_day_res[["ffmc"]]
      dmc_prev  <- fwi_day_res[["dmc"]]
      dc_prev   <- fwi_day_res[["dc"]]
    }

    rm(t_stack, rh_stack, ws_stack, p_stack, land_mask)
    gc()
  }
}

message("Script 3 Complete: FWI calculated.")
```


```{r}
#Calculate area-weighted mean per region per day.

library(terra)
library(data.table)
library(pbapply)
library(exactextractr)
library(sf)
library(raster)

fwi_dir   <- "E:/ERA5_Fire/fwi2"
gpkg_path <- "E:/ERA5_Fire/polygons_raw/merge4326.shp"
out_csv   <- "E:/ERA5_Fire/wholeregion_stats_all_layers10426weighted.csv"

fwi_files <- list.files(fwi_dir, pattern = "\\.nc$", full.names = TRUE)

p_sf <- st_read(gpkg_path, quiet = TRUE)
sample_r <- rast(fwi_files[1])

p_sf <- st_transform(p_sf, st_crs(sample_r))

cat("==========================================\n")
cat("Total Regions Ready:", nrow(p_sf), "\n")
head(p_sf)
cat("Alignment confirmed. Starting extraction...\n")
cat("==========================================\n")

results_list <- pblapply(fwi_files, function(f) {

  r_terra <- rast(f)
  v_names <- c("temp", "rh", "ws", "prec", "ffmc", "dmc", "dc", "isi", "bui", "fwi", "dsr")
  names(r_terra) <- v_names

  r_stack <- stack(r_terra)

  ext_vals <- exact_extract(r_stack, p_sf, "mean", progress = FALSE)

  res_dt <- as.data.table(ext_vals)
  setnames(res_dt, old = names(res_dt), new = paste0(v_names, "_mean"))

  res_dt[, region := p_sf$name_merge]
  res_dt[, date := as.IDate(gsub("^FWI_|\\.nc$", "", basename(f)), format = "%Y_%m_%d")]

  res_dt
})

final_data <- rbindlist(results_list)
fwrite(final_data, out_csv)

message("Daily means calculated.")
```


```{r}
#Filter out 1989, trend analysis.

library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(Kendall)
library(trend)
library(modifiedmk)

df <- fread("E:/ERA5_Fire/wholeregion_stats_all_layers10426weighted.csv")
df[, date := as.IDate(date)]
df <- df[year(date) > 1989]

annual_climate <- df %>%
  group_by(region, year = year(date)) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_temp = mean(temp_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_rh   = mean(rh_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_wind = mean(ws_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_precip = sum(prec_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_fwi  = mean(fwi_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

run_climate_trend <- function(data, var_name) {

  message("Processing: ", var_name)

  data %>%
    group_by(region) %>%
    arrange(year) %>%
    summarise(
      mk_p  = tryCatch(MannKendall(na.omit(.data[[var_name]]))$sl[1], error = function(e) NA),
      sen_s = tryCatch(sens.slope(na.omit(.data[[var_name]]))$estimates, error = function(e) NA),
      sen_p = tryCatch(sens.slope(na.omit(.data[[var_name]]))$p.value, error = function(e) NA),
      mod_p = tryCatch(mmkh(na.omit(.data[[var_name]]))$"new P.value", error = function(e) NA),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    rename_with(~paste0(var_name, "_", .), -region)
}

vars <- c("mean_temp", "mean_rh", "mean_wind", "total_precip", "mean_fwi")

climate_results <- lapply(vars, run_climate_trend, data = annual_climate)

final_climate_table <- Reduce(function(x, y) {
  left_join(x, y, by = "region")
}, climate_results)

fwrite(final_climate_table, "E:/ERA5_Fire/Table_Part1_Climate_Trendsweighted.csv")
```


```{r}
#Trend analysis of FWI, classified by days at each danger level.

danger_levels <- c("Low", "Moderate", "High", "VeryHigh", "Extreme")

annual_danger <- df %>%
  mutate(
    year = year(date),
    class = factor(case_when(
      fwi_mean < 4.54  ~ "Low",
      fwi_mean < 9.38  ~ "Moderate",
      fwi_mean < 17.35 ~ "High",
      fwi_mean < 52.36 ~ "VeryHigh",
      TRUE ~ "Extreme"
    ), levels = danger_levels)
  ) %>%
  group_by(region, year, class) %>%
  summarise(days = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::complete(region, year, class, fill = list(days = 0)) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = class, values_from = days) %>%
  mutate(Severe_Total = High + VeryHigh + Extreme)

inventory <- annual_danger %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(c(danger_levels, "Severe_Total")), sum, .names = "total_days_{.col}"))

danger_vars <- c(danger_levels, "Severe_Total")

danger_results <- lapply(danger_vars, run_climate_trend, data = annual_danger)

final_danger_table <- Reduce(function(x, y) {
  left_join(x, y, by = "region")
}, danger_results) %>%
  left_join(inventory, by = "region")

fwrite(final_danger_table, "E:/ERA5_Fire/Table_Part2_Danger_Trendsweighted.csv")
```


```{r}
#Join output table of script 5 and 6

library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(sf)

climate_tab <- fread("E:/ERA5_Fire/Table_Part1_Climate_Trendsweighted.csv")
danger_tab  <- fread("E:/ERA5_Fire/Table_Part2_Danger_Trendsweighted.csv")

mega_table <- left_join(climate_tab, danger_tab, by = "region")

p <- st_read("E:/ERA5_Fire/polygons_raw/merge4326.shp", quiet = TRUE)

wales_names  <- p$name_merge[!is.na(p$CTYUA23NMW)]
france_names <- p$name_merge[!is.na(p$code_insee)]

mega_table <- mega_table %>%
  mutate(
    region_type = case_when(
      region %in% wales_names  ~ "Wales",
      region %in% france_names ~ "France",
      TRUE ~ "Rest_of_GB"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(region, region_type, everything())

fwrite(mega_table, "E:/ERA5_Fire/MEGA_Regional_Trends_10426weighted.csv")

cat("Table saved.")
```


```{r}
#Work out Mahalanobis distance of each county to Gwynedd.

library(data.table)
library(dplyr)

df <- fread("E:/ERA5_Fire/wholeregion_stats_all_layers10426weighted.csv")
df[, date := as.IDate(date)]
df <- df[year(date) > 1989]

metrics <- df %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  summarise(
    fwi_m   = mean(fwi_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    fwi_p95 = quantile(fwi_mean, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    dmc_m   = mean(dmc_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    dc_m    = mean(dc_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  na.omit()

X <- scale(metrics[, -1])
rownames(X) <- metrics$region
covm <- cov(X)

if (!"Gwynedd" %in% rownames(X)) stop("Gwynedd missing from data!")

target <- X["Gwynedd", ]

metrics$maha_dist <- sqrt(mahalanobis(X, center = target, cov = covm))

fwrite(metrics, "E:/ERA5_Fire/Mahalanobis_Results_10426weighted.csv")

message("Mahalanobis results saved.")
```
